caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and "IAN" on the front, a navy blue baseball cap, and grey headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and bracelets on both wrists. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, white banners feature the word "HUSTLE" and five stars. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the beginning, his left hand is raised near his head and his right hand is held low. He then opens his right hand in a gesturing motion and eventually brings his left hand down to rest near his shoulder while continuing to speak into the microphone.
